title: Continuous Internal Evaluation (CIE) Process Flow
description: A flowchart illustrating the automated, algorithm-driven evaluation process for student assessments in a Game Theory course, showing how different components interact to determine a final CIE score.
relationships: Student inputs are processed by the Evaluation Algorithm
The algorithm uses the Strategy Analysis Module and Nash Equilibrium Checker to assess game-theoretic quality
Scores are stored in the Performance Database for tracking
All components feed into the algorithm which calculates the Final CIE Score
